pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.Cfn: Specifies the configuration of a button that appears in an in-app message.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.And.Description: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages sent to Android.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.Def.Description: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in an in-app message.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.IOS.Description: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages sent to iOS devices.

pinpoint.campaign.inappmessagebutton.Web.Description: An object that defines the default behavior for a button in in-app messages for web applications.
